generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong national security. But have you seen how our allies are cutting defense budgets while expecting us to foot the bill? It's time we prioritize OUR preparedness. The recent near-miss with North Korea showed what happens when we're not fully ready. Let's make sure our military has what it needs to keep us safe - without reckless spending. #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartDefense
